# SERP Strategists - AI Growth Operator

> SERP Strategists is an AI Growth Operator that continuously audits, fixes, publishes, and monitors organic search and AI search visibility — without agency overhead. Built for founders and small teams.

## What we do

- Crawls websites and detects 40+ SEO issue types automatically
- Fixes technical SEO with approval gates, logs, and rollback-ready actions
- Optimizes for GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) so pages are cited in ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews
- Creates and publishes SEO-optimized content targeting keyword gaps
- Tracks rankings, organic traffic, and AI citations over time
- Learns from shipped work so each next recommendation is better

## Who we serve

Founders, developers, and small teams who want execution without agency overhead.

## Pricing

- **Free**: Full site audit, issue prioritization, GEO readiness score — 1 site, no fixes
- **Growth**: $49/month — governed fixes, content workflows, ranking monitoring — 1 site
- **Scale**: $99/month — full automation, GEO optimization, competitor tracking — 3 sites

All paid plans include a 14-day free trial. Cancel anytime.
